verified.name: AnimeChan
verified.tagline: Random anime quotes with character and series attribution
verified.description: Pulls a random line from a large library of anime quotes, each tagged with the character who said it and the show it came from. Filter by anime or character, or just grab a random quote. No key needed on the current api.animechan.io host.

data.content: There are stars and planets floating around me. I don't think I could handle astronomy right now.

verified.notes: Live API is now at api.animechan.io/v1; the old animechan.vercel.app host is gone.

verified.name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
verified.tagline: Open Access catalog of The Met's collection
verified.description: Query object records from the Metropolitan Museum of Art, including titles, artists, dates, departments and public-domain image links. Look up any object by ID or pull the full object-ID index. Fully keyless with open CORS.

verified.name: Crossref Metadata Search
verified.tagline: Scholarly metadata for tens of millions of DOIs
verified.description: Look up bibliographic metadata for academic works by DOI or free-text query across journal articles, books, datasets and more. Returns publisher, authors, titles, reference counts and citation links. Free public pool with no key; add a mailto for the faster polite pool.

title: How the Mind Hurts and Heals the Body.

verified.rateLimit: 5 requests/second, 1 concurrent (public pool, per X-Rate-Limit headers)

verified.name: Gutendex
verified.tagline: JSON search over the Project Gutenberg library
verified.description: A read-only web API over Project Gutenberg's public-domain book catalog. Search by author, title, language or topic and get back IDs, authors, download counts and file links. No key required.
verified.notes: The /books path needs a trailing slash; bare /books returns a 301 that then hangs.

verified.name: Nager.Date
verified.tagline: Public holidays for 100+ countries by year
verified.description: Returns official public and bank holidays for a given country and year, including local names, dates and whether each holiday is nationwide or regional. Also serves long weekends and supported-country lists. Keyless v3 REST endpoints with open CORS.
verified.notes: Open-source project with an optional paid tier for higher SLA; the base REST API is keyless.

verified.name: UK Bank Holidays
verified.tagline: Official UK bank holidays as JSON
verified.description: The UK government's machine-readable feed of bank holidays for England & Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland. Each event carries a title, date, notes and a 'bunting' flag. Served under the Open Government Licence with no key required.
verified.notes: Feed spans a rolling window of years; the first event in the sample is from 2019.

verified.name: Coinlore
verified.tagline: Keyless crypto prices, market cap and rankings
verified.description: Returns live ticker data for thousands of cryptocurrencies, including USD price, market cap, supply figures and percent changes over 1h/24h/7d. Query the full ranked list or specific coins by ID. No key and open CORS.

verified.name: CryptAPI
verified.description: A non-custodial crypto payment processor whose read endpoints are keyless. The /{coin}/info/ call returns a coin's minimum amounts, forwarding fee and live fiat conversion rates. Designed for generating payment addresses and callbacks in commercial checkout flows.
verified.freeTier: Free API; provider takes ~1% fee per forwarded payment
verified.notes: The /{coin}/info/ endpoint is keyless and returns coin config plus live fiat prices.

skipped.name: Waifu.pics
skipped.reason: API host api.waifu.pics is NXDOMAIN and the waifu.pics domain now serves an unrelated gambling site; API dead.

skipped.name: DummyImage
skipped.reason: Returns image/png, not JSON — image generator with no JSON endpoint.

skipped.name: Icons8
skipped.reason: img.icons8.com returns image/png binaries, not JSON.

skipped.name: Chainlink
skipped.reason: On-chain oracle / dev docs; no keyless REST JSON GET endpoint.

skipped.name: Chainpoint
skipped.reason: tierion.com/chainpoint is a marketing HTML page; Chainpoint network deprecated, no live keyless JSON API found.

skipped.name: Helium
skipped.reason: api.helium.io is NXDOMAIN — legacy blockchain API decommissioned after the Solana migration.

skipped.name: Domainsdb.info
skipped.reason: Now returns HTTP 401 'API key required'; anonymous access disabled despite the listing.

skipped.name: Non-Working Days
skipped.reason: GitHub repo of static ICS files (icsdb); no JSON API.

skipped.name: Russian Calendar
skipped.reason: isdayoff.ru returns content-type text/plain body '1', not JSON.

skipped.name: File.io
skipped.reason: File sharing via POST upload; GET download needs the file link/key, no keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: FileUp
skipped.reason: GitHub repo for a self-hosted upload service; POST upload API, no public keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: The Null Pointer
skipped.reason: 0x0.st is POST-based (curl -F) file/URL hosting; no keyless JSON GET endpoint.

skipped.name: 1inch
skipped.reason: Requires an API key (portal.1inch.dev); no keyless endpoint despite the listing.

skipped.name: btcnode.uk
skipped.reason: Homepage returns HTTP 502 and endpoints return HTTP 402 (x402 micropayment required); no free keyless JSON endpoint found within attempts.

skipped.name: CoinCap
skipped.reason: api.coincap.io is NXDOMAIN — the v2 REST API was sunset; v3 requires a key.

skipped.name: CoinStats
skipped.reason: Public path returns HTTP 404; the API now requires an API key (openapi.coinstats.app).
